dashboard.label: Asset Discovery
dashboard.description: Discover Splunk indexes and sourcetypes that contain data matching your monitored endpoints

search.query: index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(target_ip) as unique_ips, values(hostname) as hostnames, values(target_ip) as ips, values(group) as groups, values(entitytype) as entity_types, values(device) as devices, values(vendor) as vendors by hostname | mvexpand hostnames | dedup hostnames | rename hostnames as asset_name, ips as ip_addresses | table asset_name, ip_addresses, groups, entity_types, devices, vendors | sort asset_name

html.p: Searches for indexes where your monitored IP addresses appear in common IP fields (src_ip, dest_ip, ip, host, src, dest, dvc_ip)

search.query: | tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ BY index, sourcetype | rename count as baseline_count | join type=left index, sourcetype [| search index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats values(target_ip) as ping_ips by hostname | mvexpand ping_ips | dedup ping_ips | map search="| tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ (src_ip=$ping_ips$ OR dest_ip=$ping_ips$ OR ip=$ping_ips$ OR host=$ping_ips$ OR src=$ping_ips$ OR dest=$ping_ips$ OR dvc_ip=$ping_ips$) BY index, sourcetype" maxsearches=100 | stats sum(count) as matched_events by index, sourcetype] | where matched_events > 0 | eval match_ratio = round((matched_events / baseline_count) * 100, 2) | sort -matched_events | table index, sourcetype, matched_events, baseline_count, match_ratio | rename matched_events as "Events with Matching IPs", baseline_count as "Total Events", match_ratio as "Match Ratio %"

html.p: Searches for indexes where your monitored hostnames appear in common host fields (host, src_host, dest_host, dvc, hostname, computer)

search.query: | tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ BY index, sourcetype | rename count as baseline_count | join type=left index, sourcetype [| search index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | dedup hostname | map search="| tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ (host=\"*$hostname$*\" OR src_host=\"*$hostname$*\" OR dest_host=\"*$hostname$*\" OR dvc=\"*$hostname$*\" OR hostname=\"*$hostname$*\" OR computer=\"*$hostname$*\") BY index, sourcetype" maxsearches=100 | stats sum(count) as matched_events by index, sourcetype] | where matched_events > 0 | eval match_ratio = round((matched_events / baseline_count) * 100, 2) | sort -matched_events | table index, sourcetype, matched_events, baseline_count, match_ratio | rename matched_events as "Events with Matching Hosts", baseline_count as "Total Events", match_ratio as "Match Ratio %"

panel.title: Common IP/Host Fields Across All Indexes

html.p: Shows which fields commonly contain IP addresses and hostnames that could be used for correlation

search.query: | tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ BY index, sourcetype | head 50 | map maxsearches=50 search="| search index=$index$ sourcetype=$sourcetype$ | head 1000 | fieldsummary | where match(field, \"(?i)(ip|host|src|dest|dvc|computer|addr|machine|system|server|node)\") | eval index=\"$index$\", sourcetype=\"$sourcetype$\" | table index, sourcetype, field, count, distinct_count" | stats sum(count) as total_values, avg(distinct_count) as avg_distinct by index, sourcetype, field | where total_values > 10 | sort index, sourcetype, -total_values | table index, sourcetype, field, total_values, avg_distinct | rename total_values as "Total Values", avg_distinct as "Avg Distinct Values"

html.p: Enter an IP address or hostname to find all indexes/sourcetypes containing that asset

search.query: | tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ $search_asset$ BY index, sourcetype | sort -count | rename count as "Matching Events"
index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(hostname) as asset_count
index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(target_ip) as ip_count
index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(group) as group_count
index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(entitytype) as type_count
